title: Fires: Resized
description: Significantly lowered fire and soul fire animations to lessen visual obstruction.
body:
# Fires: Resized
*Significantly lowers the height of fire animations for both normal and soul fire variants, creating less visual obstruction. Also lowers the fire animation that is used in first person.*

## Features
  - Drastically lowered fire & soul fire animations
  - Minimized HUD fire overlay when taking damage

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
